allow: PowerShell($content = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\apekshaarde\\.claude\\projects\\c--Projects-CREDAI-AFR-credai-afr-frontend\\9eda3c63-53e6-4db2-9a38-24b5e768bff4\\tool-results\\mcp-figma-get_design_context-1779952979335.txt' -Raw; $data = ConvertFrom-Json $content; foreach \($item in $data\) { if \($item.type -eq 'text'\) { Write-Output $item.text.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(4000, $item.text.Length\)\) } })

PowerShell($content = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\apekshaarde\\.claude\\projects\\c--Projects-CREDAI-AFR-credai-afr-frontend\\9eda3c63-53e6-4db2-9a38-24b5e768bff4\\tool-results\\mcp-figma-get_design_context-1779952979335.txt' -Raw; $idx = $content.IndexOf\('Table Row'\); if \($idx -ge 0\) { Write-Output $content.Substring\($idx, [Math]::Min\(3000, $content.Length - $idx\)\) } else { Write-Output 'Not found - searching for row data...' ; $idx2 = $content.IndexOf\('APP/'\); if \($idx2 -ge 0\) { Write-Output $content.Substring\($idx2, [Math]::Min\(3000, $content.Length - $idx2\)\) } })

PowerShell($content = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\apekshaarde\\.claude\\projects\\c--Projects-CREDAI-AFR-credai-afr-frontend\\9eda3c63-53e6-4db2-9a38-24b5e768bff4\\tool-results\\mcp-figma-get_design_context-1779952979335.txt' -Raw; $idx = $content.IndexOf\('columnheader'\); if \($idx -ge 0\) { Write-Output $content.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0,$idx-100\), [Math]::Min\(1500, $content.Length - $idx + 100\)\) } else { $idx2 = $content.IndexOf\('Application Number'\); Write-Output $content.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0,$idx2-100\), [Math]::Min\(800, $content.Length - $idx2 + 100\)\) })
